2606.20506.title: FreeStyle: Free Control of Style-Content Dual-Reference Generation from Community LoRA Mining
2606.20506.paper_summary: Style-content dual-reference generation aims to synthesize an image that preserves the structure and semantics of a content reference while adopting the style of a separate style reference.Despite recent progress, this setting remains challenging because models must balance content fidelity, style alignment, and instruction following avoiding semantic leakage from the style reference.A key bottleneck is the lack of large-scale triplet data with clean content-style separation and broad long-tail style coverage.In this work, we propose FreeStyle, a scalable dual-reference generation framework based on community LoRA mining.We treat community LoRAs as compositional anchors for style and content, and design a rigorous generation and filtering pipeline to construct large-scale Style-Reference and Content-Reference triplets across multiple base models.To address content leakage, we adopt a two-stage curriculum with stage-specific disentanglement mechanisms: an attention-level enrichment constraint that suppresses style-reference leakage in the style-transfer stage, and a frequency-aware RoPE modulation strategy that targets positional-correspondence-based leakage in the harder dual-reference stage.We also introduce a benchmark covering both style-reference and dual-reference generation, with evaluations on style similarity, content preservation, aesthetics, instruction following, and leakage rejection. The benchmark incorporates a style-invariant Content Alignment Score (CAS) and introduces a calibrated VLM-based Rejection Score for evaluating generation reliability and leakage suppression.Extensive experiments show that our model achieves a strong balance among style alignment, content preservation, and leakage suppression.
2606.20506.paper_summary_zh: 風格-內容雙參考生成旨在合成一個圖像，該圖像在保留內容參考的結構和語義的同時，採用單獨風格參考的風格。儘管最近取得了進展，但這一設置仍然具有挑戰性，因為模型必須平衡內容忠實度、風格對齊和遵循指令，避免風格參考中的語義洩漏。一個主要瓶頸是缺乏具有乾淨內容-風格分離和廣泛長尾風格覆蓋的大規模三元組數據。在這項工作中，我們提出了FreeStyle，一個基於社區LoRA挖掘的可擴展雙參考生成框架。我們將社區LoRA視為風格和內容的組合錨，並設計了一個嚴謹的生成和過濾管道，以構建跨多個基礎模型的大規模風格參考和內容參考三元組。為了解決內容洩漏問題，我們採用兩階段課程，並設計了特定階段的解耦機制：在風格轉換階段，採用一種注意力級別的增強約束來抑制風格參考的洩漏，並在更困難的雙參考階段，採用一種基於頻率的RoPE調制策略來針對基於位置對應的洩漏。我們還引入了一個涵蓋風格參考和雙參考生成的基準，並對風格相似性、內容保留、美學、遵循指令和洩漏拒絕進行評估。該基準包含一個風格不變的內容對齊分數（CAS），並引入了一個經過校準的基於VLM的拒絕分數，用於評估生成的可靠性和洩漏抑制。大量實驗表明，我們的模型在風格對齊、內容保留和洩漏抑制之間實現了良好的平衡。
2606.20506.author: Jinghong Lan et.al.
2606.20506.authors: Jinghong Lan, Wei Cheng, Yunuo Chen, Ziqi Ye, Peng Xing, Yixiao Fang, Rui Wang, Yufeng Yang, Xuanyang Zhang, Xianfang Zeng, Difan Zou, Gang Yu, Chi Zhang
